---
title: "Species index — A–Z (by common name)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

[View A–Z by scientific name](/trees/genus/index2.html)

# Species index (A–Z)

## A

- [Apple Evereste (*Malus*)](/trees/species/apple-evereste.html) — Genus: [Malus](/trees/genus/malus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Ash (*Fraxinus excelsior*)](/trees/species/ash.html) — Genus: [Fraxinus](/trees/genus/fraxinus.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)

## B

- [Beech (*Fagus sylvatica*)](/trees/species/beech.html) — Genus: [Fagus](/trees/genus/fagus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Bird Cherry (*Prunus padus*)](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) — Genus: [Prunus](/trees/genus/prunus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Black Alder (*Alnus glutinosa*)](/trees/species/black-alder.html) — Genus: [Alnus](/trees/genus/alnus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)
- [Black Pine (*Pinus nigra*)](/trees/species/black-pine.html) — Genus: [Pinus](/trees/genus/pinus.html) — Family: [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)
- [Black Poplar (*Populus nigra betulifolia*)](/trees/species/black-poplar.html) — Genus: [Populus](/trees/genus/populus.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)

## C

- [Common Hawthorn (*Crataegus monogyna*)](/trees/species/common-hawthorn.html) — Genus: [Crataegus](/trees/genus/crataegus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)
- [Cork Oak (*Quercus suber*)](/trees/species/cork-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Crab Apple (*Malus sylvestris*)](/trees/species/crab-apple.html) — Genus: [Malus](/trees/genus/malus.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## D

- [Downy Birch (*Betula pubescens*)](/trees/species/downy-birch.html) — Genus: [Betula](/trees/genus/betula.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## E

- [English Walnut (*Juglans regia*)](/trees/species/english-walnut.html) — Genus: [Juglans](/trees/genus/juglans.html) — Family: [Juglandaceae](/trees/family/juglandaceae.html)

## F

- [Field Maple (*Acer campestre*)](/trees/species/field-maple.html) — Genus: [Acer](/trees/genus/acer.html) — Family: [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html)
- [Fig (*Ficus carica*)](/trees/species/fig.html) — Genus: [Ficus](/trees/genus/ficus.html) — Family: [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html)
- [Fruitless Mulberry (*Morus alba*)](/trees/species/fruitless-mulberry.html) — Genus: [Morus](/trees/genus/morus.html) — Family: [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html)

## G

- [Goat Willow (*Salix caprea*)](/trees/species/goat-willow.html) — Genus: [Salix](/trees/genus/salix.html) — Family: [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)
- [Grey Alder (*Alnus incana*)](/trees/species/grey-alder.html) — Genus: [Alnus](/trees/genus/alnus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## H

- [Holm Oak (*Quercus ilex*)](/trees/species/holm-oak.html) — Genus: [Quercus](/trees/genus/quercus.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Hornbeam (*Carpinus betulus*)](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) — Genus: [Carpinus](/trees/genus/carpinus.html) — Family: [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## L

- [London Plane (*Platanus × hispanica*)](/trees/species/london-plane.html) — Genus: [Platanus](/trees/genus/platanus.html) — Family: [Platanaceae](/trees/family/platanaceae.html)

## O

- [Olive (*Olea europaea*)](/trees/species/olive.html) — Genus: [Olea](/trees/genus/olea.html) — Family: [Oleaceae](/trees/family/oleaceae.html)

## P

- [Persimmon (*Diospyros kaki*)](/trees/species/persimmon.html) — Genus: [Diospyros](/trees/genus/diospyros.html) — Family: [Ebenaceae](/trees/family/ebenaceae.html)

## Q

- [Quince (*Cydonia oblonga*)](/trees/species/quince.html) — Genus: [Cydonia](/trees/genus/cydonia.html) — Family: [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html)

## S

- [Stone Pine (*Pinus pinea*)](/trees/species/stone-pine.html) — Genus: [Pinus](/trees/genus/pinus.html) — Family: [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)
- [Sweet Chestnut (*Castanea sativa*)](/trees/species/sweet-chestnut.html) — Genus: [Castanea](/trees/genus/castanea.html) — Family: [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)
- [Sycamore Maple (*Acer pseudoplatanus*)](/trees/species/sycamore-maple.html) — Genus: [Acer](/trees/genus/acer.html) — Family: [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html)
